summary: Full e2e testing of Phoneme-Mon v2. Tested boot screen, mode select (3 modes), gender toggle, ONLINE DUEL flow → oracle select → matchmaking → create room (room code displayed) → join with invalid code (error shown) → BACK to mode select. SOLO → oracle select → rival → calibration screen with BURST/FLOW/TONE progress dots. Backend: all 6 tests pass (health, scores CRUD, rooms POST/exists). Battle HUD and EndGame cannot be reached without mic in headless - verified via code review instead.

integration_issues.issue: Cannot test auto-transition from calibration to BATTLE_LOOP in headless - mic not available, calibration stays on BURST phoneme indefinitely. Expected: needs real mic or a skip/bypass mechanism for testing.

issues: Very low contrast text - SELECT MODE label and mode descriptions use very dim rgba colors on near-black background (pre-existing from iteration_1)

action_items: Consider adding a 'skip calibration' button (dev mode or test-only) to allow testing battle and end-game flows without mic
critical_code_review_comments: EndGameScreen: share-replay-button is conditionally rendered only when onShare prop is provided — verify App.js always passes onShare to show SHARE REPLAY button
OnlineMatchmaking: join-room-btn is disabled when inputCode.length < 4 (not < 5) — technically 4-char codes are allowed when 5-char is expected; minor UX inconsistency
seed_data_creation: Created room via POST /api/rooms during test (code: Y39AU). Created score via POST /api/scores: player_title=TEST_Tester
context_for_next_testing_agent: Boot→DiegeticInstall→ONLINE DUEL→oracle_select(8s fallback works)→ancient→OnlineMatchmaking: PASS. Create Room (room code shown): PASS. Join invalid code error: PASS. BACK to mode select: PASS. SOLO→oracle_select→rival→CalibrationScreen: PASS (shows BURST phoneme + 3 dots). Battle HUD/EndGame untested (no mic). Backend 6/6 tests pass. EndGameScreen code-reviewed: share-replay-button present with data-testid when onShare prop passed.
rca_of_issues: Calibration cannot auto-complete in headless: CalibrationScreen waits for phoneme detection from mic input (RMS > threshold). No timeout fallback to skip calibration. EndGameScreen SHARE REPLAY button is conditional on onShare prop - App.js must pass it for button to render.
